market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available everyone on Mac
articles.description: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is putting OpenAI’s safety record under the microscope
articles.description: Can Sam Altman—or any CEO—be trusted with super intelligence?

articles.title: Bumble is getting rid of the swipe, CEO says
articles.description: Based on Whitney Wolfe Herd's past comments about Bumble's new direction, the company is expected to lean into AI -- Bumble is even working on an AI dating assistant called Bee, and the CEO has made many comments over the years about how AI will be "a supercharger to love and relationships."

articles.title: CZ floats Binance.US revival to give U.S. users access to global crypto liquidity
articles.description: The Binance founder said BNB Chain is the optimal payments rail for automated transactions between AI agents, noting that U.S. crypto policies are improving.

articles.title: Could Lovable’s automatic 10% pay raise be the cure for toxic cultures?
articles.description: Stockholm-based vibe-coding platform Lovable is offering employees an automatic 10% raise as a way to sidestep classic corporate politics.

articles.title: Tether executive warns the 2026 midterms could have 'seismic impact' on crypto industry
articles.description: Jesse Spiro, Head of Government Affairs at Tether, said at Consensus Miami 2026 that the midterms will be a key test for whether crypto’s recent policy gains in Washington can survive politically.

articles.title: Bitmine to slow down ether purchases as it nears accumulation goal, Tom Lee says
articles.description: At the current pace of purchases, Lee said his Ethereum treasury giant would reach its 5% ether accumulation goal in six weeks, then shift its focus to staking and share buybacks.

articles.title: 'DeFi is not dead,' it’s going mainstream with AI agents, crypto executives agree
articles.description: DeFi and its underlying technology have already proved themselves at scale, said eToro CEO Yoni Assia.

articles.title: Donald Trump Jr. denies rumors World Liberty Financial is falling apart
articles.description: World Liberty Financial co-founder Donald Trump Jr. and co-founder and CEO Zach Witkoff pushed back on recent online rumors as the crypto firm battles Justin Sun in court.

articles.title: Kalshi doubles valuation in 5 months, hitting $22B
articles.description: Prediction market startup Kalshi has raised a $1 billion Series F round led by Coatue.

articles.title: Jeff Bezos rep leaves Slate Auto’s board
articles.description: Melinda Lewison's departure raises questions about Bezos' support and involvement with the startup at a time when the Amazon founder is now apparently focused on robotics at his new startup, Project Prometheus.

articles.title: Kalshi see valuation double to $22B after $1B raise as prediction markets boom
articles.description: Fresh capital from top Wall Street and Silicon Valley firms signals increasing confidence in regulated event trading and retail prediction markets.

articles.title: Samson Mow defends Strategy selling portions of its Bitcoin treasury
articles.description: The Bitcoin advocate spoke up after Michael Saylor signaled that the company might sell some BTC, a major departure from the Strategy founder's previous rhetoric.

articles.title: Amazon’s new AI wallet: AWS, Coinbase, and Stripe build payment rails for bots
articles.description: Amazon said AI agents for now will be allowed to buy APIs, web content and other online services, but that future versions would enable hotel bookings, travel reservations and payments to merchants.

articles.title: Bitcoin ending May above $76,000 would confirm new bull market, Tom Lee says
articles.description: Tokenization and AI agentic finance are the main narratives driving the next bull cycle in crypto, Lee said at Consensus 2026.

articles.title: The stablecoin queue: 20 banks and tech giants are waiting to issue tokens with Anchorage Digital
articles.description: Since the Genius Act passed, Anchorage has won every single large stablecoin issuance mandate across the landscape, according to the firm’s CEO Nathan McCauley.

articles.title: Crypto Polo Cup returns for its fourth edition in Palm Beach during Consensus Miami week
articles.description: Hosted by Luna PR, the fourth edition of the Crypto Polo Cup (CPC) will take place on May 9, 2026, at the Santa Clara Polo Club, alongside Consensus Miami.

articles.title: The great derivatives disconnect: Why 'negative' funding is actually a bullish signal for Bitcoin
articles.description: Panelists are split on the four-year cycle's relevance, with year-end price targets varying widely from potentially not reaching a new high to possible targets of $150k or $250k.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Google’s $9.99-per-month AI health coach launches May 19
articles.description: The Gemini-powered health coach will act as a combination fitness coach, sleep expert, and health and wellness advisor.
